message:
feat(session_correlation): Cx-first refresh_cass_summary_for_session — trail complete (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Follow-on to tick 80. Final session_correlation.rs public async
entry point — the TTL-gated summary refresh.

Addition (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `refresh_cass_summary_for_session_with_cx(cx, storage, cass,
    session_id, options)` — Cx-first parallel of
    `refresh_cass_summary_for_session`. Routes the cass
    subprocess call through `query_session_with_cx` (tick
    11/12). Two checkpoint seams:
      - pre-flight: pre-cancelled cx returns before the
        initial `storage.get_agent_session` call.
      - between the cass query and the persist step: a
        late-cancelled caller can abort before updating the
        session record with stale/stale-about-to-overwrite
        external_meta.

TTL-gated refresh semantics preserved bit-for-bit:
  - `options.force = false` + recent refresh timestamp →
    returns cached summary from external_meta, no cass call,
    no persist, no second checkpoint.
  - `options.force = true` → always re-queries cass.
  - Missing `external_id` on the record → returns
    "cass external_id missing on agent session" error on both
    paths.
  - Missing session (session_id not found) → returns
    "agent session not found: <id>" error on both paths.

Regression test (new)
`refresh_cass_summary_with_cx_missing_session_matches_legacy`:

  * Opens a fresh StorageHandle (no agent sessions in it).
  * Calls BOTH `refresh_cass_summary_for_session` and
    `refresh_cass_summary_for_session_with_cx` with
    session_id=999.
  * Asserts error strings are bit-for-bit equal AND contain
    "agent session not found: 999".

If the pre-flight checkpoint on the Cx-first path accidentally
short-circuited an uncancelled cx, the test would fail with a
different error message (the checkpoint error would be
surfaced instead of the expected "agent session not found"
error).

session_correlation.rs Cx-first trail COMPLETE. All 3 public
async entry points have Cx-first siblings:
  * `correlate_with_cass`              ✓ (tick 80)
  * `correlate_and_persist_for_pane`   ✓ (tick 80)
  * `refresh_cass_summary_for_session` ✓ (tick 81, this commit)

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * session_correlation:: — 49 passed / 0 failed (tick 80: 48
    -> tick 81: 49, +1 new parity test)
  * cargo build -p frankenterm-core --lib — clean (1m01s)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
